Trigger.name: Sketching Runes
Trigger.script:
regez = regez or {} regez.runeSketch = regez.runeSketch or {}
local rune = matches[2]:lower() local targetRaw = matches[3]
-- Normalize target text for display local target if targetRaw == "yourself" then target = "me" elseif targetRaw == "the ground" then target = "ground" elseif targetRaw == "a totem" then target = "totem" else target = targetRaw end
-- Store context regez.runeSketch.last = { rune = rune, target = target }
-- Kill old timer if it exists if regez.runeSketch.timer then killTimer(regez.runeSketch.timer) end
-- Auto-clear after 10 seconds regez.runeSketch.timer = tempTimer(10, function() regez.runeSketch.last = nil regez.runeSketch.timer = nil end)
-- Echo + suppress original line local runeCap = rune:gsub("^%l", string.upper)
deleteLine() cecho(string.format( "\n<light_slate_blue>[GroundeCombat] <cyan>Sketching <yellow>%s on <white>%s<cyan>\n", runeCap, target:upper() ))

regexCodeList.string: ^You begin sketching an? (\w+) rune on (yourself|the ground|a totem|[A-Za-z][A-Za-z -']*)\.$

Trigger.name: Sketch Finished
Trigger.script:
regez = regez or {} regez.runeSketch = regez.runeSketch or {}
local rune = matches[2]:lower()
-- Define rune benefits local runeBenefits = { uruz = "Healing(G)", fehu = "Sleep(G)(T)(RB)", thurisaz = "Ranged+No Flood(G)", raidho = "Travel(G)", kena = "Fear(G)(T)/Impatience(RB)", gebo = "Cutting(A)", gebu = "Blunt(A)", gular = "Stonewall(G)", wunjo = "Cure Blind(G)(T)/Shivering+Ribs(RB)", hugalaz = "Hailstorm(G)/Hail Dmg(RB)", nauthiz = "Drain Water(G)", isaz = "Balance+Hinder(G)/Epilepsy(RB)", jera = "+1 STR +1 CON", loshre = "Anorexia(G)(T)/Addition+HlthMana Drain(RB)", algiz = "10% Resistance", sowulu = "Damage(G)(T)/Limbdmg+Hlthleech(RB)", tiwaz = "Def Strip(G)(T)/Gravity(G)/Resto Bal+Arm Brk(RB)", berkana = "Health Regen", nairat = "Entangle(G)(T)/Freeze(RB)", eihwaz = "Dampen Vibes(G)/Mask Venom(RB)", mannaz = "Cure Deaf(G)/Balance+Mana stop(RB)", laguz = "Damage(RB)", lagul = "Bleeding(RB)", lagua = "Disembowel Dmg(RB)", inguz = "Paralysis(G)(T)(RB)", dagaz = "Curing(G)", othala = "Anti Prism+Shield(G)", pithakhan = "Mana(G)(T)(RB)", sleizak = "Voyria(G)(T)/Lethargy-Nausea-Voyria(RB)", }
local benefit = runeBenefits[rune] or "Unknown" local runeCap = rune:gsub("^%l", string.upper)
-- Default target if we don't have a recent begin-line local target = "unknown"
if regez.runeSketch.last and regez.runeSketch.last.rune == rune then target = regez.runeSketch.last.target or target end
-- Clear stored context immediately regez.runeSketch.last = nil
-- Kill expiration timer if still active if regez.runeSketch.timer then killTimer(regez.runeSketch.timer) regez.runeSketch.timer = nil end
deleteLine()
cecho(string.format( "\n<light_slate_blue>[GroundeCombat] <cyan>Sketched <yellow>%s (<green>%s) on <white>%s<cyan>.", runeCap, benefit, target ))

regexCodeList.string: ^With a flourish, you finish sketching an? (\w+) rune\.$

Trigger.name: Battlefury Balance
Trigger.script: grounde = grounde or {} grounde.bf_ready = true --tempTimer(3, ground.bf_ready = true) -- optional -- grounde.offenseTick()

regexCodeList.string: You may channel the fury of battle once again.

Trigger.name: Falcon Report
Trigger.script:
local person = matches[2] local cur = tonumber(matches[3]) or 0 local max = tonumber(matches[4]) or 1 if max <= 0 then max = 1 end
ak.knownmaxhealth = ak.knownmaxhealth or {} ak.knownmaxhealth[person] = max ak.currenthealth = cur ak.maxhealth = max
local pct = math.floor((cur / max) * 100 + 0.5) -- rounded ak.healthpercent = pct
cecho("\n<light_slate_blue>[GroundeCombat] <white>[<yellow>Health<white>]: <green>" .. pct .. "%")
grounde.onFalconReport(personName, hpPercent)
-- Optional: feed Grounde offense state if grounde and grounde.onFalconReport then grounde.onFalconReport(person, pct) end
ak.scoreup(person)

regexCodeList.string: ^You sense through your connection with your falcon that she is pursuing ([\w'-]+), who has (\d+) health of a maximum of (\d+)\.$

Trigger.name: Engaged
Trigger.script:
grounde = grounde or {}
local person = matches[2] or matches[1] if person then person = person:gsub("[^%w'%-]", "") grounde.engaged = true grounde.engagedTarget = person -- Optional debug: cecho("\n<light_slate_blue>[GroundeCombat] Engaged: "..person) end

regexCodeList.string: ^As ([\w'\-]+) turns away from you, you draw upon the power of isaz

Trigger.name: Lost Engage
Trigger.script:
grounde = grounde or {}
if grounde.engaged then grounde.engaged = false grounde.engagedTarget = nil -- Optional debug: cecho("\n<light_slate_blue>[GroundeCombat] Engagement cleared.") else -- Already not engaged, do nothing. grounde.engaged = false grounde.engagedTarget = nil end

regexCodeList.string: ^You drop back and ease the engagement\.$
^Ahh, I am truly sorry, but I do not see anyone by that name here\.$
^You detect nothing here by that name\.$
^Nothing can be seen here by that name\.$
^I do not recognise anything called that here\.$

Alias.name: Offense Alias
Alias.script:
if matches[1] == "atk" then grounde.start() elseif matches[1] == "stap" then grounde.stop() else end
--grounde.offenseStep() --grounde.perceiveThenOffense()

Alias.name: Falcon Slay
Alias.script:
local t = (matches[2] and matches[2] ~= "" and matches[2]) or _G.target t = tostring(t or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if t == "" then cecho("\n<red>Usage: ;f <target>\n") return end
send(string.format("falcon track %s/falcon slay %s", t, t))

Alias.name: Engage Target
Alias.script:
local t = (matches[2] and matches[2] ~= "" and matches[2]) or _G.target t = tostring(t or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if t == "" then cecho("\n<red>Usage: ;eng <target>\n") return end
send("engage " .. t)

Script.name: Discipline Aliases
Script.script:
local function trim(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")) end local function splitArgs(s) local t = {} s = trim(s) for w in s:gmatch("%S+") do t[#t+1] = w end return t end
local function getTarget(arg1) local t = trim(arg1 or "") if t ~= "" then return t end if type(_G.target) == "string" and trim(_G.target) ~= "" then return trim(_G.target) end return nil end
function discipline_alias(key, rest) key = (key or ""):lower() local a = splitArgs(rest)
local function falcon_help() cecho([[ <cyan>Falcon shorthands</cyan> fcom - show this help fa - FALCON ASSESS fr - FALCON RECALL fsan - FALCON SANCTUARY fl - FALCON LAND fc - FALCON CIRCLE ftr [val] - FALCON TRAIN IN STRENGTH/SPEED/STAMINA frep - FALCON REPORT fsl [t] - FALCON SLAY <target> (uses `target` if omitted) fh - FALCON HUNT ff <hp> - FALCON FLEE <hp> fslp - FALCON SLEEP ffr - FALCON FEED RAT fs [t] - FALCON SEEK <target> (uses `target` if omitted) fg - FALCON GLANCE ffo [t] - FALCON FOLLOW <target> (uses `target` if omitted) ftk [t] - FALCON TRACK <target> (uses `target` if omitted) fst [t] - FALCON STARTLE <target>(uses `target` if omitted) frk [t] - FALCON RAKE <target> (uses `target` if omitted) fret <item> - FALCON RETRIEVE <item> fob - FALCON OBSERVE fwh - FALCON WARHAWK ]]) end
-- Falcon if key == "fcom" then falcon_help(); return end if key == "fa" then send("FALCON ASSESS"); return end if key == "fr" then send("FALCON RECALL"); return end if key == "fsan"then send("FALCON SANCTUARY"); return end if key == "fl" then send("FALCON LAND"); return end if key == "fc" then send("FALCON CIRCLE"); return end if key == "frep"then send("FALCON REPORT"); return end if key == "fh" then send("FALCON HUNT"); return end if key == "fslp"then send("FALCON SLEEP"); return end if key == "ffr" then send("FALCON FEED RAT"); return end if key == "fg" then send("FALCON GLANCE"); return end if key == "fob" then send("FALCON OBSERVE"); return end if key == "fwh" then send("FALCON WARHAWK"); return end
if key == "fsl" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: fsl <target>
") return end send("FALCON SLAY " .. t); return end
if key == "ftr" then local v = a[1]; if not v then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: ff <speed><stamina><strength>
") return end send("FALCON TRAIN IN " .. v); return end
if key == "ff" then local v = a[1]; if not v then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: ff <health>
") return end send("FALCON FLEE " .. v); return end
if key == "fs" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: fs <target>
") return end send("FALCON SEEK " .. t); return end
if key == "ffo" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: ffo <target>
") return end send("FALCON FOLLOW " .. t); return end
if key == "ftk" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: ftk <target>
") return end send("FALCON TRACK " .. t); return end
if key == "fst" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: fst <target>
") return end send("FALCON STARTLE " .. t); return end
if key == "frk" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: frk <target>
") return end send("FALCON RAKE " .. t); return end
if key == "fret" then local item = trim(rest):gsub("^%S+%s*", "") -- safe-ish; but we already split. We'll rebuild: item = trim(table.concat(a, " ")) if item == "" then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: fret <item>
") return end send("FALCON RETRIEVE " .. item); return end
-- Self / utility if key == "we" then send("WEATHERING"); return end if key == "fi" then send("FITNESS"); return end if key == "gr" then send("GRIP"); return end if key == "rg" then send("RELAX GRIP"); return end if key == "re" then send("RESISTANCE"); return end if key == "cl" then send("CLOT"); return end if key == "ra" then send("RAGE"); return end
if key == "fy" then local v = (a[1] or "") if v == "" then send("FURY") else send("FURY " .. v:upper()) end return end if key == "rfy" then send("RELAX FURY"); return end
-- Block / Unblock if key == "bl" then local dir = a[1]; if not dir then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: bl <dir>
") return end send("BLOCK " .. dir); return end if key == "ub" then send("UNBLOCK"); return end
-- Barge / Battlecry if key == "bg" then local t = getTarget(a[1]) local dir = a[2] if not t or not dir then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: bg <target> <dir>
") return end send("BARGE " .. t .. " " .. dir); return end if key == "bc" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: bc <target>
") return end send("BATTLECRY " .. t); return end
-- Shoot / Aim if key == "sh" then local t = getTarget(a[1]) local dir = a[2] if not t or not dir then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: sh <target> <dir>
") return end send("SHOOT " .. t .. " " .. dir); return end if key == "am" then local t = getTarget(a[1]) local dir = a[2] if not t or not dir then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: am <target> <dir>
") return end send("AIM " .. t .. " " .. dir); return end
-- Stand firm if key == "sf" then send("STAND FIRM"); return end
-- Quivers if key == "ea" then -- ea <colour> <venom> -- ea <num> <colour> <venom> if #a == 2 then send("ENVENOM ARROWS " .. a[1] .. " " .. a[2]); return elseif #a >= 3 then send("ENVENOM ARROWS " .. a[1] .. " " .. a[2] .. " " .. a[3]); return else cecho("
<yellow>Usage: ea <colour> <venom> OR ea <num> <colour> <venom>
") return end end
if key == "iq" then send("INSPECT QUIVER"); return end
if key == "dy" then local n, colour = a[1], a[2] if not n or not colour then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: dy <num> <colour>
") return end send("DYE " .. n .. " ARROWS " .. colour); return end
if key == "sw" then local colour = a[1] if not colour then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: sw <colour|normal>
") return end send("SWITCH " .. colour); return end
-- Defend / Undefend if key == "df" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: df <target>
") return end send("DEFEND " .. t); return end if key == "udf" then send("UNDEFEND"); return end
-- Engage / Disengage if key == "eg" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: eg <target>
") return end send("ENGAGE " .. t); return end if key == "dg" then local t = getTarget(a[1]) if t then send("DISENGAGE " .. t) else send("DISENGAGE") end return end end

Script.name: Runelore Aliases
Script.script:
local function trim(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")) end local function splitArgs(s) local t = {} s = trim(s) for w in s:gmatch("%S+") do t[#t+1] = w end return t end
local function getTarget(arg1) local t = trim(arg1 or "") if t ~= "" then return t end if type(_G.target) == "string" and trim(_G.target) ~= "" then return trim(_G.target) end return nil end
function runelore_alias(key, rest) key = (key or ""):lower() local a = splitArgs(rest)
-- ========================= -- HELP / CHEATSHEET -- ========================= if key == "rhelp" or key == "rh" then cecho("
<cyan>==== Runelore Aliases Cheatsheet ====
")
cecho("
<green>-- Totems --
") cecho(" <white>ct <grey>-> CARVE TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>st <grey>-> STAND TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>imp <grey>-> IMPLANT TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>upr <grey>-> UPROOT TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>tun <yellow>[totem] [mode] <grey>-> TUNE [totem] ENEMIES|NONALLIES|NONMEMBERS
") cecho(" <white>des <yellow>[full phrase] <grey>-> DESIGNATE [full phrase]
") cecho(" <white>clm <yellow>[totem] <grey>-> CLAIM [totem]
") cecho(" <white>rej <yellow>[totem] <grey>-> REJECT [totem]
") cecho(" <white>sr <yellow>[rune] [totem] [slot] <grey>-> SKETCH [rune] ON [totem] ON SLOT [1-6]
")
cecho("
<green>-- Smudge --
") cecho(" <white>sm <yellow>[totem] <grey>-> SMUDGE [totem]
") cecho(" <white>sms <yellow>[totem] [slot] <grey>-> SMUDGE [totem] SLOT [1-6]
") cecho(" <white>smg <yellow>[rune] <grey>-> SMUDGE GROUND [rune]
") cecho(" <white>smo <yellow>[rune] <grey>-> SMUDGE [rune] OFF ME
") cecho(" <white>csm <yellow>[runeblade] [rune] <grey>-> SMUDGE [runeblade] [rune]
")
cecho("
<green>-- Generic Sketch --
") cecho(" <white>sk <yellow>[rune] [target...] <grey>-> SKETCH [RUNE] ON [TARGET...]
")
cecho("
<green>-- Sketch on Ground / Totems --
") cecho(" <white>ken <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH KENA ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>feh <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH FEHU ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>ing <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH INGUZ ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>wun <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH WUNJO ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>sow <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH SOWULU ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>man <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH MANNAZ ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>sle <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH SLEIZAK ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>tiw <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH TIWAZ ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>los <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH LOSHRE ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>nai <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH NAIRAT ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>pit <yellow>[ground|totem] <grey>-> SKETCH PITHAKHAN ON GROUND|TOTEM
") cecho(" <white>hug ground <grey>-> SKETCH HUGALAZ ON GROUND
") cecho(" <white>eih ground <grey>-> SKETCH EIHWAZ ON GROUND
") cecho(" <white>uru <grey>-> SKETCH URUZ ON GROUND
") cecho(" <white>dag <grey>-> SKETCH DAGAZ ON GROUND
") cecho(" <white>isa <grey>-> SKETCH ISAZ ON GROUND
") cecho(" <white>oth <grey>-> SKETCH OTHALA ON GROUND
") cecho(" <white>nau <grey>-> SKETCH NAUTHIZ ON GROUND
") cecho(" <white>rai <grey>-> SKETCH RAIDO ON GROUND
") cecho(" <white>gul <yellow>[direction] <grey>-> SKETCH GULAR ON GROUND [direction]
") cecho(" <white>thu <yellow>[target] <grey>-> SKETCH THURISAZ ON GROUND FOR [target]
")
cecho("
<green>-- Sketch on Me / Target --
") cecho(" <white>jer <yellow>[me|target] <grey>-> SKETCH JERA ON ME|TARGET
") cecho(" <white>alg <yellow>[me|target] <grey>-> SKETCH ALGIZ ON ME|TARGET
") cecho(" <white>ber <yellow>[me|target] <grey>-> SKETCH BERKANA ON ME|TARGET
")
cecho("
<green>-- Sketch on Weapons --
") cecho(" <white>lagl <yellow>[weapon] <grey>-> SKETCH LAGUL ON [weapon]
") cecho(" <white>lagu <yellow>[weapon] <grey>-> SKETCH LAGUA ON [weapon]
") cecho(" <white>lagz <yellow>[weapon] <grey>-> SKETCH LAGUZ ON [weapon]
") cecho(" <white>nai w <yellow>[weapon] <grey>-> SKETCH NAIRAT ON [weapon]
") cecho(" <white>pit w <yellow>[weapon] <grey>-> SKETCH PITHAKHAN ON [weapon]
") cecho(" <white>hug w <yellow>[weapon] <grey>-> SKETCH HUGALAZ ON [weapon]
") cecho(" <white>eih w <yellow>[weapon] <grey>-> SKETCH EIHWAZ ON [weapon]
")
cecho("
<green>-- Sketch on Armour --
") cecho(" <white>gebu <yellow>[armour] <grey>-> SKETCH GEBU ON [armour]
") cecho(" <white>gebo <yellow>[armour] <grey>-> SKETCH GEBO ON [armour]
")
cecho("
<green>-- Empower / Configuration --
") cecho(" <white>emp <yellow>[item] <grey>-> EMPOWER [item]
") cecho(" <white>empt <yellow>[totem] <grey>-> EMPOWER TOTEM [totem]
") cecho(" <white>cem <yellow>[rune] <grey>-> EMPOWER [rune]
") cecho(" <white>cps <yellow>[r1] [r2] [r3] <grey>-> EMPOWER PRIORITY SET [r1] [r2] [r3]
") cecho(" <white>cpc <grey>-> EMPOWER PRIORITY CLEAR
") cecho(" <white>cfg <yellow>[core] [r1] [r2] [r3] <grey>-> SKETCH CONFIGURATION ...
")
cecho("
<green>-- Raido Helpers --
") cecho(" <white>rh <grey>-> SAY RIDE HOME
") cecho(" <white>rl <grey>-> RAIDO LOCATE
") cecho(" <white>rs <grey>-> RAIDO SEVER
")
cecho("
<green>-- Combat --
") cecho(" <white>bis <yellow>[target] [venom] <grey>-> BISECT [target] [venom]
")
cecho("
<cyan>Tip: <grey>Most sketch aliases accept <yellow>GROUND<grey> or a totem name.
") end
-- ========================= -- SMUDGE variants -- ========================= -- sm <totem> if key == "sm" then local x = a[1] if not x then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: sm <totem>
") return end send("SMUDGE " .. x); return end
-- sms <totem> <slot#> if key == "sms" then local totem, slot = a[1], a[2] if not totem or not slot then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: sms <totem> <1-6>
") return end send("SMUDGE " .. totem .. " SLOT " .. slot); return end
-- smg [rune] (blank = all ground runes, per SMUDGE GROUND) if key == "smg" then local rune = a[1] if rune then send("SMUDGE GROUND " .. rune) else send("SMUDGE GROUND") end return end
-- smo <rune> (SMUDGE <rune> OFF ME) if key == "smo" then local rune = a[1] if not rune then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: smo <rune>
") return end send("SMUDGE " .. rune .. " OFF ME"); return end
-- ========================= -- Generic sketch -- ========================= -- sk <rune> <on> <thing...> -- expands to: SKETCH <rune> ON <THING...> if key == "sk" then local rune = a[1] if not rune then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: sk <rune> <on target>
Example: sk kena ground

") return end table.remove(a, 1) local on = trim(table.concat(a, " ")) if on == "" then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: sk <rune> <on target>

") return end send("SKETCH " .. rune:upper() .. " ON " .. on:upper()); return end
-- ========================= -- Common rune shorthands -- ========================= -- Ground/totem runes: <key> [ground|<totem>] default: GROUND local function sketchGroundOrTotem(rune) local where = a[1] if not where then where = "GROUND" end send("SKETCH " .. rune .. " ON " .. where:upper()) end
-- Me/target runes: <key> [me|<target>] default: ME local function sketchMeOrTarget(rune) local who = a[1] if not who or who:lower() == "me" then send("SKETCH " .. rune .. " ON ME") return end local t = getTarget(who) if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: " .. key .. " me|<target>
") return end send("SKETCH " .. rune .. " ON " .. t) end
-- Weapon runes: <key> <weapon> local function sketchOnWeapon(rune) local w = a[1] if not w then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: " .. key .. " <weapon>
") return end send("SKETCH " .. rune .. " ON " .. w) end
-- KENA / URUZ / FEHU / PITHAKHAN / INGUZ / WUNJO / SOWULU / MANNAZ / SLEIZAK / TIWAZ / LOSHRE if key == "ken" then sketchGroundOrTotem("KENA"); return end if key == "uru" then send("SKETCH URUZ ON GROUND"); return end if key == "feh" then sketchGroundOrTotem("FEHU"); return end
if key == "pit" then -- pit ground|<totem> OR pit w <weapon> if (a[1] or ""):lower() == "w" then local w = a[2]; if not w then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: pit w <weapon>
") return end send("SKETCH PITHAKHAN ON " .. w); return end sketchGroundOrTotem("PITHAKHAN"); return end
if key == "jer" then sketchMeOrTarget("JERA"); return end if key == "ing" then sketchGroundOrTotem("INGUZ"); return end if key == "wun" then sketchGroundOrTotem("WUNJO"); return end
if key == "sow" then sketchGroundOrTotem("SOWULU"); return end if key == "man" then sketchGroundOrTotem("MANNAZ"); return end if key == "sle" then sketchGroundOrTotem("SLEIZAK"); return end if key == "tiw" then sketchGroundOrTotem("TIWAZ"); return end
if key == "alg" then sketchMeOrTarget("ALGIZ"); return end if key == "dag" then send("SKETCH DAGAZ ON GROUND"); return end if key == "isa" then send("SKETCH ISAZ ON GROUND"); return end if key == "oth" then send("SKETCH OTHALA ON GROUND"); return end if key == "nau" then send("SKETCH NAUTHIZ ON GROUND"); return end
if key == "ber" then sketchMeOrTarget("BERKANA"); return end
if key == "gul" then local dir = a[1] if not dir then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: gul <direction>
") return end send("SKETCH GULAR ON GROUND " .. dir); return end
if key == "thu" then local t = getTarget(a[1]) if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: thu <target>
") return end send("SKETCH THURISAZ ON GROUND FOR " .. t); return end
-- Armour runes if key == "gebu" then local arm = trim(table.concat(a, " ")) if arm == "" then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: gebu <armour>
") return end send("SKETCH GEBU ON " .. arm); return end if key == "gebo" then local arm = trim(table.concat(a, " ")) if arm == "" then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: gebo <armour>
") return end send("SKETCH GEBO ON " .. arm); return end
-- Weapon runes (runeblade core/perma) if key == "lagl" then sketchOnWeapon("LAGUL"); return end -- bleeding if key == "lagu" then sketchOnWeapon("LAGUA"); return end -- disembowel amp / blunt numb if key == "lagz" then sketchOnWeapon("LAGUZ"); return end -- limb damage (NOTE: add lagz key if you want) if key == "hug" then -- hug ground OR hug w <weapon> if (a[1] or ""):lower() == "w" then local w = a[2]; if not w then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: hug w <weapon>
") return end send("SKETCH HUGALAZ ON " .. w); return end send("SKETCH HUGALAZ ON GROUND"); return end if key == "nai" then -- nai ground|<totem> OR nai w <weapon> if (a[1] or ""):lower() == "w" then local w = a[2]; if not w then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: nai w <weapon>
") return end send("SKETCH NAIRAT ON " .. w); return end sketchGroundOrTotem("NAIRAT"); return end if key == "eih" then -- eih ground OR eih w <weapon> if (a[1] or ""):lower() == "w" then local w = a[2]; if not w then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: eih w <weapon>
") return end send("SKETCH EIHWAZ ON " .. w); return end send("SKETCH EIHWAZ ON GROUND"); return end if key == "los" then sketchGroundOrTotem("LOSHRE"); return end
-- ========================= -- Totems -- ========================= if key == "ct" then send("CARVE TOTEM"); return end if key == "st" then send("STAND TOTEM"); return end -- sr <rune> <totem> <slot> if key == "sr" then local rune, totem, slot = a[1], a[2], a[3] if not rune or not totem or not slot then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: sr <rune> <totem> <1-6>
") return end send("SKETCH " .. rune:upper() .. " ON " .. totem .. " ON SLOT " .. slot); return end
-- ========================= -- Raido helpers -- ========================= if key == "rai" then send("SKETCH RAIDO ON GROUND"); return end if key == "rh" then send("SAY RIDE HOME"); return end if key == "rl" then send("RAIDO LOCATE"); return end if key == "rs" then send("RAIDO SEVER"); return end
-- ========================= -- Empower / Runicarmour / Runeblades -- ========================= -- emp <item> (armour or weapon) if key == "emp" then local item = trim(table.concat(a, " ")) if item == "" then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: emp <armour|weapon>
") return end send("EMPOWER " .. item); return end
-- empt <totem> if key == "empt" then local t = a[1] if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: empt <totem>
") return end send("EMPOWER TOTEM " .. t); return end
-- ========================= -- Configuration -- ========================= -- cfg <runeblade/left/right/wielded> <r1> <r2> [r3] if key == "cfg" then if not a[1] or not a[2] or not a[3] then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: cfg <runeblade|left|right|wielded> <r1> <r2> [r3]
") return end local core = a[1] local r1, r2, r3 = a[2], a[3], a[4] local cmd = "SKETCH CONFIGURATION " .. core .. " " .. r1 .. " " .. r2 if r3 then cmd = cmd .. " " .. r3 end send(cmd); return end
-- csm <runeblade> <rune> (SMUDGE <runeblade> <rune in configuration>) if key == "csm" then local rb, r = a[1], a[2] if not rb or not r then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: csm <runeblade> <rune>
") return end send("SMUDGE " .. rb .. " " .. r); return end
-- cem <rune> (EMPOWER <rune>) if key == "cem" then local r = a[1] if not r then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: cem <rune>
") return end send("EMPOWER " .. r); return end
-- cps <r1> <r2> <r3> (EMPOWER PRIORITY SET ...) if key == "cps" then if not a[1] or not a[2] or not a[3] then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: cps <r1> <r2> <r3>
") return end send("EMPOWER PRIORITY SET " .. a[1] .. " " .. a[2] .. " " .. a[3]); return end -- cpc (EMPOWER PRIORITY CLEAR) if key == "cpc" then send("EMPOWER PRIORITY CLEAR"); return end
-- ========================= -- Implant / Uproot / Tune -- ========================= if key == "imp" then send("IMPLANT TOTEM"); return end if key == "upr" then send("UPROOT TOTEM"); return end -- tun <totem> enemies|nonallies|nonmembers if key == "tun" then local totem = a[1] local mode = (a[2] or ""):upper() if not totem or mode == "" then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: tun <totem> enemies|nonallies|nonmembers
") return end send("TUNE " .. totem .. " " .. mode); return end
-- ========================= -- Designate / Claim / Reject -- ========================= -- des <person|org...> <totem> -- (simple helper; for Orders you can type full text after des) if key == "des" then -- Expect user supplies full phrase as needed: -- des <person> as owner of <totem> -- des <organisation> as owner of <totem> local phrase = trim(table.concat(a, " ")) if phrase == "" then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: des <full designate command after DESIGNATE>
Example: des Bob AS OWNER OF mytotem

") return end send("DESIGNATE " .. phrase); return end if key == "clm" then local totem = a[1]; if not totem then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: clm <totem>
") return end send("CLAIM " .. totem); return end if key == "rej" then local totem = a[1]; if not totem then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: rej <totem>
") return end send("REJECT " .. totem); return end
-- ========================= -- Bisect -- ========================= if key == "bis" then local t = getTarget(a[1]) local venom = a[2] if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: bis <target> [venom]
") return end if venom then send("BISECT " .. t .. " " .. venom) else send("BISECT " .. t) end return end
cecho("
<red>Unknown runelore shorthand: " .. key .. "
") end

Script.name: Weaponmastery 2H
Script.script:
-- ============================================================ -- Weaponmastery 2H (Grounde) - Psion-style single-line send -- Separator is hard-set to "/" -- ============================================================
grounde = grounde or {} grounde.wm = grounde.wm or {} grounde.wm._lock = grounde.wm._lock or false grounde.wm._last = grounde.wm._last or { t = 0, s = "" }
local SEP = "/"
local function gtrim(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")) end local function splitArgs(s) local t = {} s = gtrim(s) for w in s:gmatch("%S+") do t[#t+1] = w end return t end
local function getTarget(arg1) local t = gtrim(arg1 or "") if t ~= "" then return t end if type(_G.target) == "string" and gtrim(_G.target) ~= "" then return gtrim(_G.target) end return nil end
local function cqSetAlias(name, body) send("cq all|setalias " .. name .. " " .. body) end
local function shouldBlock(signature) local now = getEpoch() -- ms signature = tostring(signature or "") if grounde.wm._last.s == signature and (now - grounde.wm._last.t) < 250 then return true end grounde.wm._last.s = signature grounde.wm._last.t = now return false end
function grounde.wm.queueChain(cmds, queue) if grounde.wm._lock then return end grounde.wm._lock = true tempTimer(0.20, function() grounde.wm._lock = false end)
if type(cmds) ~= "table" or #cmds == 0 then return end
local filtered = {} for _, c in ipairs(cmds) do c = gtrim(c) if c ~= "" then filtered[#filtered+1] = c end end if #filtered == 0 then return end
local chain = table.concat(filtered, SEP) local q = gtrim(queue or "eqbal") if q == "" then q = "eqbal" end
local sig = q .. "|" .. chain if shouldBlock(sig) then return end
cqSetAlias("wmfast", chain) send("queue addclearfull " .. q .. " wmfast") end
function grounde.wm.fast2h(stance, attackCmd, queue) stance = (stance or ""):lower() if stance ~= "speed" and stance ~= "precision" then return end attackCmd = gtrim(attackCmd) if attackCmd == "" then return end
grounde.wm.queueChain({ "recover footing", "battlefury focus " .. stance, attackCmd }, queue or "eqbal") end
local function wm_help() cecho([[ <cyan>Weaponmastery (2H) shorthands</cyan>
Normal: wm, env, wipe, arc, cont, per, up, dis, foc, ovr, sl, oh, uh, cv, sp, hew, pul, clv, skc, br, dev, imp, wdr, disem, rec, disc, defl
Fast (one queued action; uses "/" separator): fuh <speed|precision> [t] - footing/focus/UNDERHAND foh <speed|precision> [t] - footing/focus/OVERHAND fsl <speed|precision> [t] [ven] - footing/focus/SLAUGHTER farc <speed|precision> [t] [ven] - footing/focus/ARC (room if no target) fdev <speed> arms|legs [t] [ven] - footing/focus(speed)/DEVASTATE ]]) end
function weaponmastery_alias(key, rest) key = (key or ""):lower() local a = splitArgs(rest)
if key == "wm" then wm_help(); return end
-- ENVENOM / WIPE if key == "env" then local weapon, venom = a[1], a[2] if not weapon or not venom then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: env <weapon> <venom>
") return end send("ENVENOM " .. weapon .. " WITH " .. venom); return end if key == "wipe" then local weapon = a[1] if not weapon then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: wipe <weapon>
") return end send("WIPE " .. weapon); return end
-- ARC if key == "arc" then if #a == 0 then send("ARC"); return end if #a == 1 then send("ARC " .. a[1]); return end local t = getTarget(a[1]) local venom = a[2] if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: arc [<target>] [venom]
") return end if venom then send("ARC " .. t .. " " .. venom) else send("ARC " .. t) end return end
-- Battlefury if key == "cont" then send("BATTLEFURY CONTINUATION"); return end if key == "per" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: per <target>
") return end send("BATTLEFURY PERCEIVE " .. t); return end if key == "up" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: up <target>
") return end send("BATTLEFURY UPSET " .. t); return end if key == "dis" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: dis <target>
") return end send("BATTLEFURY DISTRACT " .. t); return end if key == "foc" then local v = (a[1] or ""):upper() if v ~= "SPEED" and v ~= "PRECISION" then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: foc speed|precision
") return end send("BATTLEFURY FOCUS " .. v); return end if key == "ovr" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: ovr <target>
") return end send("BATTLEFURY OVERWHELM " .. t); return end
-- Core attacks if key == "sl" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: sl <target> [venom]
") return end local venom = a[2] if venom then send("SLAUGHTER " .. t .. " " .. venom) else send("SLAUGHTER " .. t) end return end if key == "oh" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: oh <target>
") return end send("OVERHAND " .. t); return end if key == "uh" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: uh <target>
") return end send("UNDERHAND " .. t); return end if key == "cv" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: cv <target>
") return end send("CARVE " .. t); return end if key == "sp" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: sp <target>
") return end send("SPLINTER " .. t); return end
-- Limb strikes if key == "hew" then local t, side, limb if #a == 2 then t = getTarget(nil) side, limb = a[1], a[2] else t = getTarget(a[1]) side, limb = a[2], a[3] end if not t or not side or not limb then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: hew [target] <left|right> <arm|leg>
") return end send("HEW " .. t .. " " .. side:upper() .. " " .. limb:upper()); return end if key == "pul" then local t, side, limb if #a == 2 then t = getTarget(nil) side, limb = a[1], a[2] else t = getTarget(a[1]) side, limb = a[2], a[3] end if not t or not side or not limb then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: pul [target] <left|right> <arm|leg>
") return end send("PULVERISE " .. t .. " " .. side:upper() .. " " .. limb:upper()); return end
-- Finishers / specials if key == "clv" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: clv <target>
") return end send("CLEAVE " .. t); return end if key == "skc" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: skc <target>
") return end send("SKULLCRUSH " .. t); return end if key == "br" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: br <target>
") return end send("BRAIN " .. t); return end
if key == "dev" then local t, zone, venom if #a == 1 then t = getTarget(nil) zone = a[1] else t = getTarget(a[1]) zone = a[2] venom = a[3] end if not t or not zone then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: dev [target] arms|legs [venom]
") return end zone = zone:upper() if zone ~= "ARMS" and zone ~= "LEGS" then cecho("
<yellow>dev expects ARMS or LEGS
") return end local cmd = "DEVASTATE " .. t .. " " .. zone if venom then cmd = cmd .. " " .. venom end send(cmd); return end
if key == "imp" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: imp <target>
") return end send("IMPALE " .. t); return end if key == "wdr" then send("WITHDRAW BLADE"); return end if key == "disem" then local t = getTarget(a[1]); if not t then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: disem <target>
") return end send("DISEMBOWEL " .. t); return end
-- Utility if key == "rec" then send("RECOVER FOOTING"); return end if key == "disc" then send("DISCIPLINE"); return end if key == "defl" then send("DEFLECT"); return end
-- ---------------------------- -- FAST (Psion-style) -- ---------------------------- if key == "fuh" then local stance = a[1] local t = getTarget(a[2]) if not stance then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: fuh <speed|precision> [target]
") return end if not t then cecho("
<yellow>fuh requires a target (or global target)
") return end grounde.wm.fast2h(stance, "UNDERHAND " .. t, "eqbal") return end
if key == "foh" then local stance = a[1] local t = getTarget(a[2]) if not stance then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: foh <speed|precision> [target]
") return end if not t then cecho("
<yellow>foh requires a target (or global target)
") return end grounde.wm.fast2h(stance, "OVERHAND " .. t, "eqbal") return end
if key == "fsl" then local stance = a[1] local t = getTarget(a[2]) local venom = a[3] if not stance then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: fsl <speed|precision> [target] [venom]
") return end if not t then cecho("
<yellow>fsl requires a target (or global target)
") return end local cmd = "SLAUGHTER " .. t .. (venom and (" " .. venom) or "") grounde.wm.fast2h(stance, cmd, "eqbal") return end
if key == "farc" then local stance = a[1] local maybeT = a[2] local maybeV = a[3] if not stance then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: farc <speed|precision> [target] [venom]
") return end
local t = getTarget(maybeT) if not t then local venom = maybeT local cmd = "ARC" .. (venom and (" " .. venom) or "") grounde.wm.fast2h(stance, cmd, "eqbal") return end
local venom = maybeV local cmd = "ARC " .. t .. (venom and (" " .. venom) or "") grounde.wm.fast2h(stance, cmd, "eqbal") return end
if key == "fdev" then local stance = a[1] local zone = (a[2] or ""):lower() local t = getTarget(a[3]) local venom = a[4]
if not stance or zone == "" then cecho("
<yellow>Usage: fdev <speed> arms|legs [target] [venom]
") return end if stance:lower() ~= "speed" then cecho("
<yellow>fdev only supports SPEED (devastate)
") return end if zone ~= "arms" and zone ~= "legs" then cecho("
<yellow>fdev expects arms or legs
") return end if not t then cecho("
<yellow>fdev requires a target (or global target)
") return end
local cmd = "DEVASTATE " .. t .. " " .. zone:upper() .. (venom and (" " .. venom) or "") grounde.wm.fast2h("speed", cmd, "eqbal") return end
cecho("
<red>Unknown weaponmastery shorthand: " .. key .. "</red>
") end

Script.name: Runewarden Offense 2H
Script.script:
-- Grounde Runewarden Offense 2H - Workbench (patched & integrated)
-- ============================================ -- Core tables -- ============================================
grounde = grounde or {} grounde.opp = grounde.opp or {} grounde._lastSend = grounde._lastSend or { s = "", t = 0 }
grounde.weapon = grounde.weapon or "sword" -- "sword" | "hammer"
grounde.WEAPON_CMD = { sword = "wield bastard sword", hammer = "wield warhammer", }
grounde.ENVENOM_SWORD_CMD = "envenom bastard sword with curare"
grounde.EMPOWER = { -- For now: same priority for hammer/sword hammer = { "isaz", "sleizak", "inguz" }, sword = { "isaz", "sleizak", "inguz" }, }
-- ============================================ -- Helpers (generic) -- ============================================
local function trim(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")) end
local function titleCaseName(name) name = trim(tostring(name or "")) -- Normalize Achaea names (letters, digits, apostrophe, hyphen) name = name:gsub("[^%w'%-]", "") name = name:lower() return (name:gsub("(%a)([%w_']*)", function(a,b) return a:upper()..b end)) end
local function sendOnce(line) line = tostring(line or "") local now = os.clock() local last = grounde._lastSend if last.s == line and last.t and (now - last.t) < 0.25 then return end last.s = line last.t = now send(line) end
-- Server-side alias helper (Achaea SETALIAS) -- We set an alias to a slash-chain and queue it (server queue) so chains are atomic. local function serverAlias(aliasName, cmds, mode) aliasName = trim(aliasName) if aliasName == "" then return end sendOnce(string.format("setalias %s %s", aliasName, table.concat(cmds, "/"))) if mode == "queue" then sendOnce("queue addclearfull full " .. aliasName) else sendOnce(aliasName) end end
local function tname() if type(_G.target) == "string" and trim(_G.target) ~= "" then return trim(_G.target) end return nil end
local function ensureOpp(t) t = titleCaseName(t) grounde.opp[t] = grounde.opp[t] or { parry = "none", parryLimb = "none", fracs = { skull = 0, tendon = 0, ribs = 0, wrist = 0 }, hpPct = nil, hpSeenAt = nil, perceived = false, lyred = nil, lyreSeenAt = nil, _lastOthala = 0, } return grounde.opp[t] end
local function empowerCmdsFor(wep) local runes = grounde.EMPOWER[wep] or {} if #runes == 0 then return {} end return { "empower priority set " .. table.concat(runes, " ") } end
-- ============================================ -- Tracking (ALL tracking functions come before any decision logic) -- ============================================
grounde.HARD_CAP = grounde.HARD_CAP or 7 grounde.FRAC_ORDER = grounde.FRAC_ORDER or { "head", "legs", "torso", "arms" } grounde.STACK_TARGET = grounde.STACK_TARGET or 4 grounde.BISECT_BELOW = grounde.BISECT_BELOW or 45 grounde.BRAIN_SKULLS = grounde.BRAIN_SKULLS or 4 grounde.DEV_L1 = grounde.DEV_L1 or 2 grounde.DEV_L2 = grounde.DEV_L2 or 4 grounde.DEV_L3 = grounde.DEV_L3 or 6 grounde.DEV_MIN_HP_FOR_L2PLUS = grounde.DEV_MIN_HP_FOR_L2PLUS or 50
local function normalizeParry(p) p = trim(p or ""):lower() if p == "" or p == "none" then return { zone = "none", limb = "none" } end if p:find("head") then return { zone = "head", limb = "head" } end if p:find("torso") or p:find("chest") or p:find("body") then return { zone = "torso", limb = "torso" } end if p:find("left leg") then return { zone = "legs", limb = "left leg" } end if p:find("right leg") then return { zone = "legs", limb = "right leg" } end if p:find("left arm") then return { zone = "arms", limb = "left arm" } end if p:find("right arm") then return { zone = "arms", limb = "right arm" } end if p:find("leg") then return { zone = "legs", limb = "unknown leg" } end if p:find("arm") then return { zone = "arms", limb = "unknown arm" } end return { zone = "none", limb = "none" } end
function grounde.setParry(person, limbText) person = titleCaseName(person) local o = ensureOpp(person) local info = normalizeParry(limbText) o.parry = info.zone o.parryLimb = info.limb o.perceived = true end
function grounde.setFracs(person, skull, tendon, ribs, wrist) person = titleCaseName(person) local o = ensureOpp(person) o.fracs.skull = tonumber(skull or 0) or 0 o.fracs.tendon = tonumber(tendon or 0) or 0 o.fracs.ribs = tonumber(ribs or 0) or 0 o.fracs.wrist = tonumber(wrist or 0) or 0 o.perceived = true end
function grounde.ingestPerceiveFromAk(person, parryLimbText) person = titleCaseName(person) grounde.setParry(person, parryLimbText) local skull = ak and ak.twoh and (ak.twoh.skull or ak.twoh.skulls) local tendon = ak and ak.twoh and (ak.twoh.tendons or ak.twoh.tendon) local ribs = ak and ak.twoh and (ak.twoh.ribs or ak.twoh.rib) local wrist = ak and ak.twoh and (ak.twoh.wrist or ak.twoh.wrists) grounde.setFracs(person, skull or 0, tendon or 0, ribs or 0, wrist or 0) -- mark pending perceive if present local p = grounde.pending and grounde.pending[person] if p then p.perceive = true end end
function grounde.setHpPct(person, pct) person = titleCaseName(person) local o = ensureOpp(person) pct = tonumber(pct or 0) or 0 if pct < 0 then pct = 0 end if pct > 100 then pct = 100 end o.hpPct = pct o.hpSeenAt = os.clock() end
function grounde.onAssessHp(person, pct) grounde.setHpPct(person, pct) -- mark pending perceive so executor can proceed if waiting local p = grounde.pending and grounde.pending[titleCaseName(person)] if p then p.perceive = true end end
function grounde.getHpPct(person, maxAge) person = titleCaseName(person) local o = ensureOpp(person) if o.hpPct == nil then return nil end local age = os.clock() - (o.hpSeenAt or 0) local limit = tonumber(maxAge or 8) or 8 if age > limit then return nil end return tonumber(o.hpPct) or nil end
-- ============================================ -- Limb damage integration (reads from your lb package) -- ============================================
local function lbHits(person, limb) if not lb then return nil end local tc = titleCaseName(person) local lc = tc:lower() local raw = trim(tostring(person or "")) local candidates = { tc, raw, raw:lower(), lc } local entry for _, k in ipairs(candidates) do if k and k ~= "" and type(lb[k]) == "table" then entry = lb[k] break end end if not entry or type(entry.hits) ~= "table" then return nil end local v = entry.hits[limb] if v == nil then v = entry.hits[limb:gsub("%s+","")] or entry.hits[limb:gsub("%s+","_")] end if v == nil then return 0 end return tonumber(v) or 0 end
function grounde.getLimbHits(person, limb) if not person or not limb then return nil end return lbHits(person, limb) end
grounde.PREP_TARGET = grounde.PREP_TARGET or 95
function grounde.limbIsBroken(person, limb) local h = lbHits(person, limb) if h == nil then return false end return h >= 100 end
function grounde.limbIsPrepped(person, limb) local h = lbHits(person, limb) if h == nil then return false end return h >= (grounde.PREP_TARGET or 95) end
function grounde.legsBroken(person) return grounde.limbIsBroken(person, "left leg") and grounde.limbIsBroken(person, "right leg") end
-- Optional helper: clear limb hit counters on break/cure events. -- Call this from your limb-break/cure parser if you want to ensure lb counters reset. function grounde._clearLimbHitsOnBreak(person, limb) if not lb then return end person = titleCaseName(person) if not lb[person] or not lb[person].hits then return end limb = trim(limb or ""):lower() if lb[person].hits[limb] then lb[person].hits[limb] = 0 end -- try alternative keys if lb[person].hits[limb:gsub("%s+","")] then lb[person].hits[limb:gsub("%s+","")] = 0 end if lb[person].hits[limb:gsub("%s+","_")] then lb[person].hits[limb:gsub("%s+","_")] = 0 end end
-- ============================================ -- Decision helpers (these only READ tracking state) -- ============================================
local function zoneCapped(o, zone) if zone == "head" then return (o.fracs.skull or 0) >= grounde.HARD_CAP end if zone == "legs" then return (o.fracs.tendon or 0) >= grounde.HARD_CAP end if zone == "torso" then return (o.fracs.ribs or 0) >= grounde.HARD_CAP end if zone == "arms" then return (o.fracs.wrist or 0) >= grounde.HARD_CAP end return false end
grounde.cmd = grounde.cmd or {} function grounde.cmd.perceive(t) return "battlefury perceive " .. t end function grounde.cmd.assess(t) return "assess " .. t end
grounde.attack = grounde.attack or {}
local function hasTargetDef(person, def) if not ak or not ak.defs then return false end person = titleCaseName(person) if type(ak.defs[def]) ~= "nil" then return ak.defs[def] == true end local pd = ak.defs[person] if type(pd) == "table" then if pd[def] == true then return true end end return false end
local function pickWeapon(pref, allowed) allowed = allowed or { hammer = true, sword = true } if pref == "hammer" and allowed.hammer then return "hammer" end if pref == "sword" and allowed.sword then return "sword" end if allowed.hammer then return "hammer" end if allowed.sword then return "sword" end return grounde.weapon or "sword" end
function grounde.attack.overhand(t) local wep = pickWeapon("hammer", { hammer = true, sword = true }) return "overhand " .. t, wep, { zone = "head", frac = "skull", kind = "attack" } end
function grounde.attack.underhand(t) local wep = pickWeapon("hammer", { hammer = true, sword = true }) return "underhand " .. t, wep, { zone = "torso", frac = "ribs", kind = "attack" } end
function grounde.attack.pulverise(t, side, limb) side = trim(side):lower() limb = trim(limb):lower() local zone = (limb == "leg") and "legs" or "arms" local frac = (limb == "leg") and "tendon" or "wrist" return string.format("pulverise %s %s %s", t, side, limb), "hammer", { zone = zone, frac = frac, kind = "attack" } end
function grounde.attack.hew(t, side, limb) side = trim(side):lower() limb = trim(limb):lower() local zone = (limb == "leg") and "legs" or "arms" local frac = (limb == "leg") and "tendon" or "wrist" return string.format("hew %s %s %s", t, side, limb), "sword", { zone = zone, frac = frac, kind = "attack" } end
function grounde.attack.brain(t) return "brain " .. t, "hammer", { zone = "head", frac = "skull", kind = "kill", requires = { overwhelm = true, skull = 5 } } end
function grounde.attack.devastate(t, zone) zone = trim(zone):lower() local wep = pickWeapon("hammer", { hammer = true, sword = true }) local frac = (zone == "legs") and "tendon" or "wrist" return string.format("devastate %s %s", t, zone), wep, { zone = zone, frac = frac, kind = "break" } end
function grounde.attack.splinter(t) return "splinter " .. t, "hammer", { kind = "defbreak", breaks = { "shield", "rebounding" } } end
function grounde.attack.carve(t) return "carve " .. t, "sword", { kind = "defbreak", breaks = { "shield", "rebounding" } } end
function grounde.attack.impale(t) return "impale " .. t, "sword", { kind = "setup", requires = { prone = true } } end
function grounde.attack.disembowel(t) return "disembowel " .. t, "sword", { kind = "kill", requires = { impale = true } } end
function grounde.attack.bisect(t) return "bisect " .. t, "sword", { kind = "execute", requires = { hp_below = 45 } } end
function grounde.attack.pickDefBreak(t) if not hasTargetDef(t, "shield") and not hasTargetDef(t, "rebounding") then return nil end if grounde.WEAPON_CMD and grounde.WEAPON_CMD.hammer and grounde.WEAPON_CMD.hammer ~= "" then return grounde.attack.splinter(t) end return grounde.attack.carve(t) end
function grounde.attack.forFracZone(t, zone) zone = trim(zone):lower() if zone == "head" then return grounde.attack.overhand(t) elseif zone == "torso" then return grounde.attack.underhand(t) elseif zone == "arms" then local o = ensureOpp(t) local left = grounde.getLimbHits(t, "left arm") or 0 local right = grounde.getLimbHits(t, "right arm") or 0 local parried = o.parryLimb local chosen if left >= right then chosen = "left" if parried == "left arm" then chosen = "right" end else chosen = "right" if parried == "right arm" then chosen = "left" end end return grounde.attack.pulverise(t, chosen, "arm") elseif zone == "legs" then local o = ensureOpp(t) local left = grounde.getLimbHits(t, "left leg") or 0 local right = grounde.getLimbHits(t, "right leg") or 0 local parried = o.parryLimb local chosen if left >= right then chosen = "left" if parried == "left leg" then chosen = "right" end else chosen = "right" if parried == "right leg" then chosen = "left" end end return grounde.attack.pulverise(t, chosen, "leg") end return grounde.attack.overhand(t) end
-- ============================================ -- Lyre tracking (prismatic barrier) -- ============================================
function grounde.setLyred(person, isUp) person = titleCaseName(person) local o = ensureOpp(person) o.lyred = (isUp == true) o.lyreSeenAt = os.clock() if type(_G.targetlyred) ~= "nil" then _G.targetlyred = o.lyred and 1 or 0 end end
function grounde.isLyred(person, maxAge) person = titleCaseName(person) local o = ensureOpp(person) local function withinAge() if not maxAge then return true end local age = os.clock() - (o.lyreSeenAt or 0) return age <= tonumber(maxAge) end if o.lyred ~= nil then return (o.lyred == true) and withinAge() end if type(_G.targetlyred) == "number" then o.lyred = (_G.targetlyred == 1) o.lyreSeenAt = os.clock() return (o.lyred == true) and withinAge() end return false end
-- ============================================ -- Fracture selection -- ============================================
function grounde.pickFracZone(person) person = titleCaseName(person) local o = ensureOpp(person) local parry = o.parry or "none" local fr = { head = (o.fracs.skull or 0), legs = (o.fracs.tendon or 0), torso = (o.fracs.ribs or 0), arms = (o.fracs.wrist or 0), } local function allowed(zone) return zone ~= parry end for _, z in ipairs(grounde.FRAC_ORDER or {"head","legs","torso","arms"}) do if fr[z] < (grounde.STACK_TARGET or 5) and allowed(z) and not zoneCapped(o, z) then return z end end local best, bestVal = nil, 1e9 for _, z in ipairs({"head","legs","torso","arms"}) do if allowed(z) then local v = fr[z] if v < bestVal then best, bestVal = z, v end end end if best then return best end for _, z in ipairs({"head","legs","torso","arms"}) do if allowed(z) then return z end end return "head" end
-- ============================================ -- Decision logic -- ============================================
local function proneScore() return (affstrack and affstrack.score and tonumber(affstrack.score.prone)) or 0 end local function isProne() return proneScore() >= 100 end local function impaleOwner() return (affstrack and affstrack.impale) or false end local function isImpalingTarget() return impaleOwner() == "Me" end
function grounde.devastateLevel(person, zone) person = titleCaseName(person) local o = ensureOpp(person) zone = trim(zone):lower() local n = 0 if zone == "legs" then n = tonumber(o.fracs.tendon or 0) or 0 elseif zone == "arms" then n = tonumber(o.fracs.wrist or 0) or 0 else return 0 end
local lvl = 0 if n >= (grounde.DEV_L3 or 6) then lvl = 3 elseif n >= (grounde.DEV_L2 or 4) then lvl = 2 elseif n >= (grounde.DEV_L1 or 2) then lvl = 1 end
-- Increase level if either limb in that zone is already broken if zone == "legs" then if grounde.limbIsBroken(person, "left leg") or grounde.limbIsBroken(person, "right leg") then lvl = math.min(3, lvl + 1) end elseif zone == "arms" then if grounde.limbIsBroken(person, "left arm") or grounde.limbIsBroken(person, "right arm") then lvl = math.min(3, lvl + 1) end end
return lvl end
local function canUseDevastateL2Plus(person) local pct = grounde.getHpPct(person) if pct == nil then return false end return pct < (grounde.DEV_MIN_HP_FOR_L2PLUS or 50) end
local function bfForZone(o, zone) zone = trim(zone):lower() local n = 0 if zone == "head" then n = tonumber(o.fracs.skull or 0) or 0 elseif zone == "legs" then n = tonumber(o.fracs.tendon or 0) or 0 elseif zone == "torso" then n = tonumber(o.fracs.ribs or 0) or 0 elseif zone == "arms" then n = tonumber(o.fracs.wrist or 0) or 0 end if n >= 4 then return "precision" end return "speed" end
-- Measure limb progress for a zone (max of the two relevant limbs) function grounde.limbProgressForZone(person, zone) person = titleCaseName(person or "") zone = trim(zone or ""):lower() if zone == "legs" then return math.max(grounde.getLimbHits(person, "left leg") or 0, grounde.getLimbHits(person, "right leg") or 0) elseif zone == "arms" then return math.max(grounde.getLimbHits(person, "left arm") or 0, grounde.getLimbHits(person, "right arm") or 0) end return 0 end
function grounde.chooseAction(person) person = titleCaseName(person) local o = ensureOpp(person) if grounde.isLyred(person, 6) then o._lastOthala = o._lastOthala or 0 local now = os.clock() if (now - o._lastOthala) >= 2.0 then o._lastOthala = now o.lyred = false o.lyreSeenAt = now return { exclusive = true, cmd = "sketch othala on ground" } end end do local atk, wep = grounde.attack.pickDefBreak(person) if atk then return { wep = wep, bf = "speed", atkCmds = { atk }, zone = "head" } end end local hp = grounde.getHpPct(person) local skull = tonumber(o.fracs.skull or 0) or 0 local ribs = tonumber(o.fracs.ribs or 0) or 0 local tend = tonumber(o.fracs.tendon or 0) or 0 if isImpalingTarget() then local dis, wep = grounde.attack.disembowel(person) return { wep = wep, bf = bfForZone(o, "torso"), atkCmds = { dis }, zone = "torso" } end if hp ~= nil and hp < (grounde.BISECT_BELOW or 45) then local bi, wep = grounde.attack.bisect(person) return { wep = wep, bf = bfForZone(o, "torso"), atkCmds = { bi }, zone = "torso" } end if skull >= (grounde.BRAIN_SKULLS or 5) then local brain, wepBrain = grounde.attack.brain(person) return { wep = wepBrain, bf = "overwhelm", atkCmds = { brain }, zone = "head" } end
-- Devastate decision: consider legs (and arms if relevant) and prefer the zone with better limb progress if ribs >= 4 then local candidates = {} local lvlLegs = grounde.devastateLevel(person, "legs") if lvlLegs >= 1 and (lvlLegs == 1 or canUseDevastateL2Plus(person)) then candidates[#candidates+1] = "legs" end local lvlArms = grounde.devastateLevel(person, "arms") if lvlArms >= 1 and (lvlArms == 1 or canUseDevastateL2Plus(person)) then candidates[#candidates+1] = "arms" end
if #candidates > 0 then local bestZone, bestProg = nil, -1 for _, z in ipairs(candidates) do local prog = grounde.limbProgressForZone(person, z) if prog > bestProg then bestZone, bestProg = z, prog end end if bestZone then local dev, _wepDev = grounde.attack.devastate(person, bestZone) local imp = select(1, grounde.attack.impale(person)) local dis = select(1, grounde.attack.disembowel(person))
-- determine sequence weapon: prefer sword if any sword-only attacks present local seq_wep = _wepDev or grounde.weapon if (imp and imp:match("^impale")) or (dis and dis:match("^disembowel")) then seq_wep = "sword" end
return { wep = seq_wep, bf = bfForZone(o, bestZone), atkCmds = { dev, imp, dis }, zone = bestZone } end end end
if tend >= (grounde.DEV_L3 or 6) then local dev, _wepDev = grounde.attack.devastate(person, "legs") local brainNeed = tonumber(grounde.BRAIN_SKULLS or 5) or 5 local ribNeed = 4 local brainScore = skull / brainNeed local ribScore = ribs / ribNeed if skull >= brainNeed and brainScore >= ribScore then local brain, wepBrain = grounde.attack.brain(person) return { wep = wepBrain, bf = "overwhelm", atkCmds = { brain }, zone = "head" } end local imp = select(1, grounde.attack.impale(person)) local dis = select(1, grounde.attack.disembowel(person))
-- determine sequence weapon: prefer sword if any sword-only attacks present local seq_wep = _wepDev or grounde.weapon if (imp and imp:match("^impale")) or (dis and dis:match("^disembowel")) then seq_wep = "sword" end return { wep = seq_wep, bf = bfForZone(o, "legs"), atkCmds = { dev, imp, dis }, zone = "legs" } end
-- default: pick a fracture zone and return its attack local zone = grounde.pickFracZone(person) local atk, wep, meta = grounde.attack.forFracZone(person, zone) local bf = bfForZone(o, meta and meta.zone or zone) return { wep = wep, bf = bf, atkCmds = { atk }, zone = (meta and meta.zone) or zone } end
-- ============================================ -- Execution / pending flow (glue to triggers) -- ============================================
grounde.pending = grounde.pending or {}
local function ensurePending(t) t = titleCaseName(t) local p = grounde.pending[t] if not p then p = { perceive = false, timeoutTimer = nil } grounde.pending[t] = p end return p end
local function clearPending(t) t = titleCaseName(t) local p = grounde.pending[t] if p and p.timeoutTimer then killTimer(p.timeoutTimer) p.timeoutTimer = nil end grounde.pending[t] = nil end
local function isEngagedWith(t) t = titleCaseName(t) if grounde.engagedTarget and titleCaseName(grounde.engagedTarget) == t then return true end return grounde.engaged == true end
-- Send the initial perceive/assess chain (server-side queued) function grounde.startCycle(t) t = titleCaseName(t) if grounde.isLyred(t, 6) then local o = ensureOpp(t) o._lastOthala = o._lastOthala or 0 local now = os.clock() if (now - o._lastOthala) >= 2.0 then o._lastOthala = now o.lyred = false o.lyreSeenAt = now sendOnce("sketch othala on ground") end return end
local p = ensurePending(t) p.perceive = false
local initCmds = {} if not isEngagedWith(t) then initCmds[#initCmds+1] = "engage " .. t end initCmds[#initCmds+1] = grounde.cmd.perceive(t) initCmds[#initCmds+1] = grounde.cmd.assess(t)
-- queue the chain server-side to keep it atomic serverAlias("grnd_init_" .. t:gsub("%s+","_"):lower(), initCmds, "queue")
-- set a timeout: if perceive never arrives, clear pending after 4s if p.timeoutTimer then killTimer(p.timeoutTimer) p.timeoutTimer = nil end p.timeoutTimer = tempTimer(4, function() clearPending(t) end) end
-- Public trigger call: when perceive/assess info is parsed, mark pending and execute. -- Your perceive/assess trigger should call this (or grounde.ingestPerceiveFromAk which marks pending already). function grounde.onPerceiveReceived(person) person = titleCaseName(person) local p = ensurePending(person) p.perceive = true -- execute now (immediate) grounde.executeAction(person) clearPending(person) end
-- Builds and sends a queued offense package for person. function grounde.executeAction(person) person = titleCaseName(person) local action = grounde.chooseAction(person) if not action then return end
-- exclusive single-server command (e.g., sketch othala) if action.exclusive and action.cmd then sendOnce(action.cmd) return end
-- Build command chain: wield (if needed), empower, envenom (sword only), battlefury (bf), attacks local cmds = {}
-- weapon switch (wield is first) if action.wep and action.wep ~= "" and action.wep ~= grounde.weapon then local wcmd = grounde.WEAPON_CMD[action.wep] if wcmd and wcmd ~= "" then cmds[#cmds+1] = wcmd; grounde.weapon = action.wep end end
-- empower local e = empowerCmdsFor(action.wep or grounde.weapon) for i = 1, #e do cmds[#cmds+1] = e[i] end
-- envenom for sword if desired and available if (action.wep == "sword" or grounde.weapon == "sword") and grounde.ENVENOM_SWORD_CMD and grounde.ENVENOM_SWORD_CMD ~= "" then cmds[#cmds+1] = grounde.ENVENOM_SWORD_CMD end
-- battlefury if action.bf then if action.bf == "overwhelm" then cmds[#cmds+1] = "battlefury overwhelm " .. person else cmds[#cmds+1] = "battlefury focus " .. action.bf end end
-- attacks for i = 1, #action.atkCmds do cmds[#cmds+1] = action.atkCmds[i] end
-- final assess to refresh HP next time cmds[#cmds+1] = grounde.cmd.assess(person)
-- send as single alias queued server-side local aliasName = "grnd_exec_" .. person:gsub("%s+","_"):lower() serverAlias(aliasName, cmds, "queue")
-- update engaged state grounde.engagedTarget = person grounde.engaged = true end
-- ============================================ -- Trigger/handler convenience notes -- ============================================ -- When your perceive trigger fires (server reply), call: -- grounde.onPerceiveReceived(person) -- or grounde.ingestPerceiveFromAk(person, parryLimbText) if you have AK data to ingest. -- When your perceive trigger fires (server reply), call: -- grounde.onPerceiveReceived(person) -- or -- grounde.ingestPerceiveFromAk(person, parryLimbText) -- When a parry trigger fires, call: -- grounde.setParry(person, limbText) -- When fracture triggers fire, call: -- grounde.setFracs(person, skull, tendon, ribs, wrist) -- When assess (hp) triggers fire, call: -- grounde.onAssessHp(person, pct) -- When lyre events fire, call: -- grounde.setLyred(person, true/false)
-- Offense start/stop functions, called in Attack alias to start/stop offense. function grounde.start(target) target = titleCaseName(target or tname() or _G.target or "") if target == "" then return end grounde.running = true grounde.startCycle(target) end
function grounde.stop() grounde.running = false grounde.engaged = false grounde.engagedTarget = nil end
-- ============================================ -- End of script -- ============================================
